mentions.note: New CEO takes over from James Quincy; lacks snack diversification of PepsiCo but GLP-1 weakness a headwind; wait for guidance.
Consumer package goods laggard except Coca-Cola; continued uptrend; new CEO Enrique Braun transition from James Quincey shows momentum continuing.
Quintessential defensive stock; up 3% despite weak tape; buy any S&P 500 weakness; own it, don't trade it.
